description_long: This armchair features a bold red upholstered frame with wide, padded armrests and a deep seat, providing a comfortable and inviting appearance. Draped over the seat and backrest is a large, textured gray houndstooth-patterned blanket, adding a cozy and stylish accent. A matching red cushion rests against the backrest, enhancing both comfort and visual appeal. A black remote control is placed on the blanket, suggesting the chair's use in a living or lounge area. The base of the chair is a low, solid black platform, giving it a modern and sturdy look. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on comfort and relaxation.
description: A modern red upholstered armchair with wide armrests, a houndstooth-patterned blanket, and a matching cushion, set on a black base. A remote control rests on the seat, adding a lived-in touch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red upholstery, wide armrests, houndstooth blanket, cushion, and remote control on the seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the armrest's thickness, the cushion, and the edge of the blanket draped over the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the draped houndstooth blanket covering most of the back and seat, with the red upholstery visible on the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest, the back cushion, and the blanket's edge, with less detail of the seat area.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, padded, and fully upholstered in red fabric
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, straight, with a loose cushion and draped blanket
attribute_leg_type: low, block-style black base with no visible individual legs
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid red fabric with a gray houndstooth-patterned blanket
